zh.lifeSummary: 當Euphemia FitzRogers de Clavering於大約1235年出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering10歲，母親Isabel Dunbar12歲。她於大約1258年與Lord William de Comyn of Kilbride結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1267年在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Euphemia FitzRogers de Clavering于大约1235年出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering10岁，母亲Isabel Dunbar12岁。她于大约1258年与Lord William de Comyn of Kilbride结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1267年在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Euphemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a Late Greek name derived from eu ‘well, good’ + phēnai ‘to speak’. This was the name of various early saints, notably a virgin martyr said to have been burned at the stake at Chalcedon in 307 . It had a limited popularity in some regions in the 16th and 17th centuries and returned to favour in the Victorian period, especially in the pet form Effie . It is little used at present.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Euphemia FitzRogers de Clavering was born about 1235, in Essex, England, her father, Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering, was 10 and her mother, Isabel Dunbar, was 12. She married Lord William de Comyn of Kilbride about 1258. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1267, in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Euphemia FitzRogers de Clavering est née environ 1235, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Isabel Dunbar, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Lord William de Comyn of Kilbride environ 1258. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1267, à Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Euphemia FitzRogers de Clavering um 1235 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering 10 und ihre Mutter Isabel Dunbar 12. Sie hat um 1258 Lord William de Comyn of Kilbride geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1267 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

Lei sposato Lord William de Comyn of Kilbride circa 1258. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1267, nel Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Euphemia FitzRogers de Claveringが約1235年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Lord Roger FitzJohn de Claveringは10歳，母Isabel Dunbarは12歳であった。約1258年にLord William de Comyn of Kilbrideと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1267年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアキルドルンミーで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Euphemia FitzRogers de Clavering(이)가 대략 1235년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering(은)는 10세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Dunbar(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 대략 1258년 Lord William de Comyn of Kilbride(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1267년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 킬드럼미에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Euphemia FitzRogers de Clavering nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Dunbar, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord William de Comyn of Kilbride aproximadamente 1258. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1267, em Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Euphemia FitzRogers de Clavering родилась около 1235 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Dunbar, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord William de Comyn of Kilbride около 1258 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1267 г. в местности каилдрумми, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 34 лет.
